nasb.text: Do not worry then, saying, ‘What will we eat?’ or ‘What will we drink?’ or ‘What will we wear for clothing?’

esv.text: Therefore do not be anxious, saying, ‘What shall we eat?’ or ‘What shall we drink?’ or ‘What shall we wear?’

cnv.text: 所以不要憂慮，說：‘我們該吃甚麼？喝甚麼？穿甚麼？’

ccb.text: 所以，你们不要忧虑‘吃什么？喝什么？穿什么？’

csbs.text: 所以不要忧虑，说‘我们吃什么？喝什么？穿什么？’
